title: Vault Door (3x3 Spiral)
description: A 3x3 spiral/iris-style piston door where 8 stone or iron blocks retract in a rotating pattern from the center outward. Each piston fires in sequence via a clock or sequencer: top, right, bottom, left pairs retract in order giving the appearance of a spiral opening. Requires careful repeater timing (1-2 tick delays between each arm). The door opens in about 0.5 seconds. A T flip-flop toggles open/close. Hidden in a wall, this looks like a solid stone wall until activated.
